CONTENT.Career: Pikhalyonok is a product of the Shakhtar youth sportive school and signed a contract with Shakhtar Donetsk in the Ukrainian Premier League in 2014.He played in the Ukrainian Premier League Reserves and made his debut for Shakhtar Donetsk in the Ukrainian Premier League in a match against Oleksandriya on 31 May 2017.
CONTENT.Honours: IndividualUkrainian Premier League Top Assists Provider: 2022-23 (10),Ukrainian Premier League Best Player of the Round :  2022-23 Round 2,
CONTENT.External links: Oleksandr Pikhalyonok at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Oleksandr Pikhalyonok at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Oleksandr Oleksandrovych Pikhalyonok (Ukrainian: Олександр Олександрович Піхальонок; born 7 May 1997) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Dynamo Kyiv in the Ukrainian Premier League.
